CORE_CLAIM: For even finite cyclic residue carriers A_m=Z/(2m)Z, the overset Orthad cross-chart transfer and quadratic self-twist satisfy the finite Weil generator gates for all swept N.
BOUNDARY: Odd N fails the q(r)=r^2/(2N) well-definedness/polarization gate and is classified as an odd-carrier boundary for this self-twist law.
